The [2026 season](/wiki/2026_NFL_season "2026 NFL season") will be the [Philadelphia Eagles](/wiki/Philadelphia_Eagles "Philadelphia Eagles")' upcoming 94th season in the [National Football League](/wiki/National_Football_League "National Football League") (NFL) and their sixth under [head coach](/wiki/List_of_Philadelphia_Eagles_head_coaches "List of Philadelphia Eagles head coaches") [Nick Sirianni](/wiki/Nick_Sirianni "Nick Sirianni"). They will attempt to improve on their 11–6 record from [the year before](/wiki/2025_Philadelphia_Eagles_season "2025 Philadelphia Eagles season"), which ended in a Wild Card round defeat by the [San Francisco 49ers](/wiki/2025_San_Francisco_49ers_season "2025 San Francisco 49ers season"), 23–19, that ended a five-game home playoff win streak and ending their chances of a repeat.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Offseason

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2026_Philadelphia_Eagles_season&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Offseason")]

### Coaching changes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2026_Philadelphia_Eagles_season&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Coaching changes")]

On January 13, 2026, the Eagles parted ways with offensive coordinator [Kevin Patullo](/wiki/Kevin_Patullo "Kevin Patullo") after only one year in that role.[[2]](#cite_note-2) On January 29, [Sean Mannion](/wiki/Sean_Mannion_(American_football) "Sean Mannion (American football)") was named the team's new offensive coordinator, marking the team’s fifth consecutive year with a new offensive coordinator.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

This will be the Eagles' first season since [2012](/wiki/2012_Philadelphia_Eagles_season "2012 Philadelphia Eagles season") without offensive line coach & run game coordinator [Jeff Stoutland](/wiki/Jeff_Stoutland "Jeff Stoutland"), who announced his departure from the organization on February 4.[[4]](#cite_note-4) [Ryan Mahaffey](/wiki/Ryan_Mahaffey "Ryan Mahaffey") was named the team's new run game coordinator & tight ends coach on February 6, and [Chris Kuper](/wiki/Chris_Kuper "Chris Kuper") was named the team's new offensive line coach on February 9.[[5]](#cite_note-5)
